SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT. DEFENDANTS JOHN AND KATHERINE CHONG APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTSON, M. D.
